title: angostura engleriana
intro: Angostura engleriana, also known as the Angostura tree, is a species of tree in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The bark and roots of this tree have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Angostura engleriana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of Angostura engleriana include decoctions made from the bark and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
